title: TPA Mod
description: A tiny mod, that lets you send teleportation requests to other players
body:
A tiny mod, that lets you send teleportation requests to other players.

### LANGUAGE

1. English
2. German
3. LOLCAT


### SYNTAX
- **/tpa <player>**: Send tpa to a player
- **/tpa accept [<player>]**: Accept tpa from the first who've send you a tpa or from a specified player
- **/tpa cancel**: Cancel current tpa
- **/tpa decline [<player>]**: Decline the tpa from a player
